您可以通过微信群、邮件或在课程申请备注中提出问题，紧急情况也可以联系 RA 助教: You can ask questions via the WeChat group, email, or the course application notes; for urgent matters, you can also contact the RA teaching assistant
题库资料可以下载吗: Can I Download Question Bank Materials?
可以。请优先使用最新资料，部分过期材料仅作为参考: Yes. Please prioritize the latest materials; some outdated materials are for reference only
回答结构清晰，对行业问题的理解扎实，建议继续强化 behavioral exam: Clear answer structure and solid understanding of industry questions; continue strengthening data-driven expression in behavioral examples
材料准备不足，建议先补齐公司研究和基础 technical 框架后再安排下一轮练: Insufficient preparation; recommend completing company research and foundational technical frameworks before scheduling the next practice round
知识点覆盖基本完整，但缺少高质量 follow-up 回答，建议继续增加 moc: Knowledge coverage is fairly complete, but lacks high-quality follow-up answers; continue increasing mock session frequency
比较成熟，电话沟通节奏稳定，对方愿意继续保持联系: Fairly mature performance; phone call pacing was steady, and the contact is willing to stay in touch
脚本痕迹偏重，建议补充更个性化的 follow-up 和针对性提问: Too scripted; recommend adding more personalized follow-ups and targeted questions
对方反馈积极，后续可围绕香港 office 的团队差异继续深挖: Positive feedback from the contact; follow up by exploring team differences within the Hong Kong office
表现稳定，case 结构完整，建议继续提升对 market assumption: Stable performance with a complete case structure; continue improving flexibility in handling market assumptions
部分还不够熟练，建议加强 debt schedule 和 returns bri: Some areas still need improvement; recommend strengthening explanations of debt schedule and returns bridge
回答优秀，框架清楚且表达自信，是当前最稳定的一次演练: Excellent answers with a clear framework and confident delivery — the most consistent practice session to date
框架不稳，需要回到基础重练并补齐公式解释: Framework is shaky; needs to return to basics and fill in formula explanations
